plugin.name: NEKO Live
plugin.description: NEKO's live interaction center: routes live chat, viewer profiles, and roast flows across supported platforms.
plugin.short_description: First danmaku triggers avatar and nickname roast.
panel.title: NEKO Live
panel.subtitle: Live control, interaction, viewers, and settings
panel.store.disabled: Plugin store is disabled; viewer profiles will not persist.

panel.streamTheme.title: Stream Theme
panel.streamTheme.hint: Private guidance for NEKO's replies, hosting beats, and cold-room support. Leave blank to use the default tiny-radio fallback.
panel.pacing.title: Pacing
panel.pacing.hint: Adjust automatic-interaction activity and cooldown. Presets apply immediately; a custom value applies after saving.

panel.dev.lookup.emailUnavailable: Not public / not provided by API
panel.dev.emitter.title: Simulated Danmaku Input
panel.dev.emitter.usingLookup: Using the UID lookup result as the default identity.
panel.dev.emitter.noLookup: No lookup result yet. Empty fields will use the built-in preset.
panel.dev.emitter.overrideHint: Empty fields use lookup results first, then the built-in preset.

entries.update_config.description: Update live mode, switches, and safety settings.
entries.pause_roast.name: Pause roast
entries.resume_roast.name: Resume roast
entries.resume_roast.description: Clear the queue and reset safety state.
entries.clear_queue.name: Clear queue
entries.trigger_idle_hosting.name: Trigger idle hosting
entries.trigger_idle_hosting.description: Manually trigger one idle-hosting pass when NEKO is solo streaming and idle.
entries.trigger_warmup_hosting.name: Trigger warmup hosting
entries.trigger_warmup_hosting.descripti: Manually trigger one solo-stream opening host beat when NEKO has just started.
entries.trigger_active_engagement.name: Trigger active engagement
entries.trigger_active_engagement.descri: Manually trigger one solo-stream active engagement beat when NEKO is in a quiet moment.
entries.set_live_room.name: Set live room
entries.set_live_room.description: Set the live room target NEKO Live should listen to for the selected platform.
entries.connect_live_room.name: Start live room listening
entries.connect_live_room.description: Enable the NEKO Live live ingest state.
entries.disconnect_live_room.name: Stop live room listening
entries.disconnect_live_room.description: Stop the NEKO Live live ingest state.
entries.submit_viewer_event.name: Submit viewer event
entries.submit_viewer_event.description: Submit a UID/URL test event from developer sandbox.
entries.submit_live_event.name: Submit live event
entries.submit_live_event.description: Submit a normalized live danmaku event.
entries.submit_manual_live_event.name: Submit manual live event
entries.submit_manual_live_event.descrip: Submit a developer-only manual live simulation event through the live pipeline.
panel.messages.roomLookupRequired: Check the live room and verify the result before confirming it.
panel.room.lookupOk: Room found. Verify the title and host, then select Confirm Room to save it.
panel.room.lookupFailed: No usable room was found. Check the room ID.
panel.liveStatusSummary.title: Ready Check
panel.liveStatusReason.ready: NEKO can see the room and output is enabled.
panel.liveStatusReason.dry_run: Dry run is on, so NEKO will not send real output.
panel.liveStatusReason.cooldown: NEKO is waiting for the cooldown.
panel.liveStatusReason.safety_degraded: Safety guard is degraded; check recent errors.
panel.liveStatusReason.output_channel_un: The output channel is unavailable; NEKO cannot push real output.
panel.liveStatusReason.all_ready: Live room, ingest, and safety checks are ready.
panel.liveModeRoleHint.companion: The streamer leads; NEKO is the partner and fills gaps with low interruption.
panel.liveModeRoleHint.solo_host: Only NEKO is on stage; NEKO is receiving viewers and holding the room.
panel.liveState.title: Live state
panel.liveStateReason.quiet_activity_gap: No new interaction for a short while.
panel.liveStateReason.low_activity: The room is quieter; NEKO is waiting for a good moment.
panel.liveStateReason.no_recent_activity: No recent interaction for a while.
panel.liveStateReason.blocked_by_live_st: The ready check is blocking NEKO.
panel.idleHostingCandidate.true: Solo stream is idle; NEKO is eligible for idle hosting.
panel.idleHostingCandidate.false: Idle hosting is not eligible right now.
panel.idleHostingStatus.title: Idle hosting
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.eligible: NEKO can fill the quiet moment now.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.not_candi: The room is not in a solo idle moment.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.minimum_i: NEKO just tried idle hosting and is waiting before speaking again.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.auto_disa: Idle hosting is paused after repeated failures.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.solo_idle: Solo stream is idle and NEKO can prepare an idle hosting line.
panel.speechExplanation.title: Why NEKO is quiet
panel.speechExplanation.summary.waiting_: Waiting for a good moment to speak
panel.speechExplanation.summary.recently: The recent event did not output
panel.speechExplanation.reason.dry_run: Dry run is enabled, so output is not pushed.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.idle_host: Solo stream is idle and ready for idle hosting.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.quiet_act: The room has been quiet for a short while.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.no_recent: There has been no recent activity.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.waiting_f: Waiting for a viewer reply or an idle hosting slot.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.recently_: The last event was skipped by policy.

actions.lookup_live_room.label: Check Room
entries.lookup_live_room.name: Check live room status
entries.lookup_live_room.description: Check the title, host, and live status for the selected platform's live room target.
panel.messages.viewerUidRequired: A viewer UID is required to manage this profile.
actions.clear_sandbox_data.label: Clear sandbox records
entries.clear_sandbox_data.name: Clear sandbox records
entries.clear_sandbox_data.description: Clear temporary developer sandbox records and avatar preview cache without affecting viewer profiles.
actions.clear_viewer_profiles.label: Clear viewer profiles
actions.delete_viewer_profile.label: Delete viewer profile
actions.reset_viewer_impression.label: Reset viewer impression
entries.clear_viewer_profiles.name: Clear viewer profiles
entries.clear_viewer_profiles.descriptio: Clear viewer profiles before a controlled live test and reset first-roast state.
entries.delete_viewer_profile.name: Delete viewer profile
entries.delete_viewer_profile.descriptio: Delete one viewer profile by UID, including first-appearance state for controlled testing.
entries.reset_viewer_impression.name: Reset viewer impression
entries.reset_viewer_impression.descript: Clear one viewer's impression memory by UID while preserving first-appearance roast state.
panel.dev.developerModeDisabled: Developer mode is off; sandbox lookup, simulated danmaku, and chat developer tools are unavailable.
panel.fields.oncePerUidHint: NEKO roasts each viewer's entrance once; later danmaku can still get normal replies.
panel.dm.desc: Coming later: Bilibili DMs — let the cat read and reply by your rules.
panel.automation.desc: Coming later: browser, keyboard/mouse, and public-data workflows for the cat to run automations.
panel.storage.title: Profile Storage
panel.storage.dirPlaceholder: Default = plugin data dir; or an absolute path
panel.storage.hint: New profiles go to the new location; existing ones are not migrated. Blank = plugin default dir.
panel.storage.disabled: Custom storage is temporarily disabled; profiles currently use the plugin default folder.
panel.storage.notWritable: Current folder isn't writable; temporarily fell back to the default. Check the path or permissions.
actions.pick_folder.label: Choose folder
panel.storage.browsed: Path filled in — click "Save location" to apply
panel.settings.safetyHint: Keep this on for normal use. NEKO pauses interaction after repeated processing failures so broken output cannot keep affecting the stream.
panel.settings.autoStopEnabled: Safety pause is on. Repeated errors will stop interaction automatically.
panel.settings.autoStopDisabled: Safety pause is off. Repeated errors will not stop interaction automatically.
panel.settings.queueHint: Choose how many interactions NEKO keeps waiting when chat suddenly gets busy. Standard works for most streams.
panel.settings.queueCautiousHint: Drops stale interactions sooner and suits smaller streams that value immediacy.
panel.settings.queueStandardHint: Balances timely replies with keeping useful interactions. Recommended for daily use.
panel.settings.queueRelaxedHint: Keeps more interactions waiting, but replies may arrive later when chat is busy.
panel.settings.queueCustomHint: A legacy custom limit is active. Choose a preset to switch to a clearer policy.
panel.settings.privacyHint: Viewer profiles remember interaction preferences and stay on the device running the plugin.
panel.settings.localStorageHint: Stored only on this device. Raw messages, cookies, and account credentials are not uploaded.
panel.settings.storagePathHint: This is the local folder currently used by the plugin. Normal use does not require changing it.
panel.settings.developerHint: Adds a separate Developer view for event simulation, runtime results, and module diagnostics. It is not needed for normal streaming.
panel.settings.disableSafetyMessage: Repeated processing failures will no longer pause interaction automatically, so broken output may continue affecting the stream.
entries.pick_folder.name: Choose folder
entries.pick_folder.description: Open the OS native folder picker and return the chosen directory (used by the panel).
panel.interaction.currentDecision.title: Current speaking decision
panel.interaction.currentDecision.subtit: Shows why NEKO spoke, waited, skipped, or only dry-ran the latest event.
panel.interaction.group.audienceHint: NEKO responds when viewers speak or send support events.
panel.interaction.group.hostingHint: NEKO fills in gently during opening, idle, and quiet moments.
panel.interaction.module.avatarRoast.ava: When off, avatar images are not read; replies use only the nickname and current message.
panel.interaction.module.avatarRoast.dis: Off: first-time viewers can still use normal danmaku replies.
panel.interaction.module.danmakuResponse: Off: normal danmaku will not trigger a NEKO reply.
panel.interaction.module.liveSupportEven: Off: gifts, Super Chats, and memberships will not trigger automatic thanks.
panel.interaction.module.warmupHosting.d: Off: NEKO will not proactively greet viewers after the stream starts.
panel.interaction.module.idleHosting.dis: Off: NEKO will not fill quiet moments automatically.
panel.interaction.module.activeEngagemen: Off: NEKO will not proactively start a new topic.
panel.liveDirector.reason.recent_activit: Recent activity is enough; NEKO should answer, not force a topic.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_warmup: Solo stream has just started; NEKO may open the room.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_quiet: Solo stream is quiet; NEKO may create one light topic.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_idle: Solo stream is idle; NEKO may cover the silence.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_idle_read: Solo stream is idle; NEKO may cover the silence.
panel.liveDirector.reason.recent_danmaku: NEKO just replied to danmaku; wait before active engagement.
panel.liveDirector.reason.auto_disabled: Auto hosting is disabled after repeated failures.
panel.interaction.module.avatarRoast.des: Comments on the viewer avatar, ID, and first line together. Each viewer only gets one entrance roast.
panel.interaction.module.danmakuResponse: Follow-up danmaku from the same UID is no longer skipped; NEKO replies to the current line without repeating avatar or ID entrance templates.
panel.interaction.module.liveSupportEven: Gift, Super Chat, and guard events get a short appreciative reply through the normal pipeline without asking for more support.
panel.interaction.module.warmupHosting.d: Opening line for solo stream before the room has any recent activity. It should feel like starting a stream, not filling dead air.
panel.interaction.module.idleHosting.des: Short filler lines when nobody is talking. Only for solo stream, and it must not pretend viewers said something.
panel.interaction.module.activeEngagemen: Conservative solo-stream engagement beat for quiet moments. Use it to test whether NEKO can create one replyable topic without sounding pushy.
panel.activeEngagementCandidate.true: Ready for a light engagement beat
panel.activeEngagementCandidate.false: Not a good moment for active engagement
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.elig: Solo stream is quiet and NEKO may create one small topic.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.defe: Active engagement is deferred while danmaku response and idle hosting are validated first.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.not_: Active engagement v0 only serves solo stream.
Active engagement waits for quiet, not engaged or fully idle moments.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.mini: Active engagement is waiting for its minimum interval.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.live: Live status is not ready for output.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.solo_stre: Solo stream has just started; NEKO may open the room.
panel.soloTestReadiness.title: Solo stream readiness
panel.messages.clearViewerProfilesConfir: Clear viewer profiles? This resets first-appearance roast state, but keeps live summaries, sandbox records, and safety queues.
panel.activeEngagementReplyAffordance.fe: Viewer answers in a few words
panel.explain.title: Live chain explanation
panel.platform.title: Live platform
panel.douyinAuth.title: Douyin Cookie
panel.douyinAuth.manualHint: Manual Cookie import only. NEKO does not automate Douyin login.
panel.douyinAuth.cookieValid: Douyin Cookie can read room metadata.
actions.douyin_cookie_import.label: Import Douyin Cookie
actions.douyin_cookie_status.label: Check Douyin Cookie
actions.douyin_cookie_validate.label: Validate Douyin Cookie
actions.douyin_cookie_delete.label: Delete Douyin Cookie
entries.douyin_cookie_import.name: Import Douyin Cookie
entries.douyin_cookie_import.description: Manually import a browser Cookie and save it encrypted for read-only Douyin live input.
entries.douyin_cookie_status.name: Check Douyin Cookie status
entries.douyin_cookie_status.description: Read the local encrypted Douyin Cookie status without returning the raw Cookie.
entries.douyin_cookie_validate.name: Validate Douyin Cookie
entries.douyin_cookie_validate.descripti: Manually validate whether the local Douyin Cookie can still read the configured room metadata without returning the raw Cookie.
entries.douyin_cookie_delete.name: Delete Douyin Cookie
entries.douyin_cookie_delete.description: Delete the locally encrypted Douyin Cookie and key.
panel.guide.preflight.title: Before going live
panel.guide.preflight.dryRunWarning: Packaged users only need to open N.E.K.O and this plugin panel. Follow the steps below; no extra startup is required.
panel.guide.preflight.openPanel.detail: Use this page as the first stop when the listener has danmaku but NEKO does not reply.
panel.guide.preflight.dryRun.detail: Choose the platform, enter a room id or link, then check the room before listening.
panel.guide.preflight.outputReady.locati: Top badges and Console > Live Status
panel.guide.preflight.outputReady.detail: Live Status, safety, and the main NEKO output window must be ready before real output can happen.
panel.guide.setup.title: First live-room setup
panel.guide.setup.platform.detail: Choose Bilibili Live before entering a Bilibili room id or link.
panel.guide.setup.login.detail: Anonymous listening can work, but login helps avoid Bilibili -352 checks and avatar or room lookup failures.
panel.guide.setup.room.detail: Enter a room id or live.bilibili.com link, then use room lookup to confirm title, anchor, and live status.
panel.guide.setup.connect.detail: Click Start. The listener should become connected or receiving before you test danmaku.
panel.guide.setup.test.detail: Use a clear message such as 'NEKO, are you there?' and check for avatar_roast or danmaku_response.
panel.guide.setup.realOutput.location: Viewers > Recent Results and Console > Live Status
panel.guide.setup.realOutput.detail: After a test danmaku, check that the latest route and Live Status match the expected behavior.
panel.guide.location.title: Where to check status
panel.guide.location.liveStatus.detail: Shows whether NEKO can speak now, why it is waiting, and whether cooldown or safety is blocking output.
panel.guide.location.listener.detail: Shows the current platform, room, listening state, viewer count, and connection errors.
panel.guide.location.recentResults.detai: Shows whether events reached the pipeline, which route handled them, and whether the result was pushed, skipped, or failed.
panel.guide.location.safety.detail: Shows cooldown, queue limit, auto-stop, and queue/safety status.
panel.guide.location.monitor.detail: Use the monitor command when a user reports danmaku is visible but NEKO says there is no data or no reply.
panel.guide.trouble.title: Danmaku is visible, but NEKO does not reply
panel.guide.trouble.intro: Check the latest status first. A visible danmaku is only the input; it can still be skipped by policy, cooldown, safety, or the output channel.
panel.guide.trouble.dryRun.meaning: NEKO saw the event but decided not to reply yet.
panel.guide.trouble.dryRun.action: Check Live Status, safety, and cooldown, then test again with a clear greeting or question.
panel.guide.trouble.skipped.meaning: The event reached the pipeline but was intentionally ignored.
panel.guide.trouble.skipped.action: Read reason/latest_reason. Common causes are low-value danmaku, cooldown, duplicate entrance roast, or safety state.
panel.guide.trouble.observedOnly.signal: Observed danmaku is greater than zero, actual reply is zero
panel.guide.trouble.observedOnly.meaning: The listener and event bus saw the danmaku, but no reply was selected or dispatched.
panel.guide.trouble.observedOnly.action: Check latest reason, safety, Live Status, cooldown, and test again with a clear question or greeting.
panel.guide.trouble.noObserved.signal: Connection is receiving, observed danmaku is zero
panel.guide.trouble.noObserved.meaning: The socket may be connected, but events are not entering the live-event pipeline.
panel.guide.trouble.noObserved.action: Reconnect the room, verify the room id, and send a plain text danmaku for testing.
panel.guide.trouble.outputUnavailable.me: NEKO Live decided to speak, but the host output channel could not accept the message.
panel.guide.trouble.outputUnavailable.ac: Check the main NEKO chat/output window, plugin pause state, and message plane readiness.
panel.guide.monitor.title: One-command diagnosis
panel.guide.monitor.desc: Run this from the repository root or unpacked package root when a user reports no reply.
panel.guide.monitor.fields: Read live, connected, safety, reason, latest_status, latest_route, recent_observed_signal_danmaku_signal, recent_actual_danmaku_response, and recent_skipped first.
panel.console.platformHint: The platform used for this session.
panel.console.limitedHint: Not signed in. Bilibili may allow a limited session connection, but some rooms will require QR sign-in.
panel.console.loginRequiredHint: Sign in is the recommended and default path. Open Account to scan the QR code.
panel.console.loginPrimaryHint: QR sign-in is recommended for stable access. Use an account-free connection only as a compatibility fallback.
panel.console.limitedEnabled: Account-free fallback enabled for this session.
panel.console.roomNumeric: Enter a Bilibili room ID or a live.bilibili.com room link.
panel.console.roomTwoStepHint: Two steps: 1. Check the live room and verify its details. 2. Confirm the live room to save it.
panel.onboarding.title: NEKO Live quick setup
panel.onboarding.resetHint: Reopen the first-use walkthrough without changing your saved live settings.
panel.onboarding.welcomeBody: Console contains the routine workflow: account, room, start, pause, resume, stop, and diagnostics. Detailed behavior and data stay in the other views.
panel.onboarding.welcomeAction: Stay in Console and follow Account → Live room → Start listening.
panel.onboarding.welcomeSuccess: You know where the routine controls and current stream status are.
panel.onboarding.accountBody: Bilibili uses QR sign-in and Douyin uses imported credentials. Bilibili can try an account-free connection only when you explicitly choose the compatibility fallback.
panel.onboarding.accountAction: Open Account and finish sign-in. Use the account-free fallback only when sign-in is unavailable.
panel.onboarding.accountSuccess: The account card shows signed in, or you deliberately chose the fallback for this session.
panel.onboarding.roomBody: Enter a room ID or supported room link, then confirm it. NEKO checks the room before saving the target.
panel.onboarding.roomAction: Enter the ID or link, select Check Room, verify the title and host, then select Confirm Room.
panel.onboarding.roomSuccess: Console shows the intended live room and its verified details.
panel.onboarding.liveBody: Start listening when the stream begins. Pause, resume, stop, and open diagnostics from the same Console page. Test mode remains an internal capability and is off by default.
panel.onboarding.liveAction: After going live, select Start Listening. Use pause, resume, or stop from Console as needed.
panel.onboarding.liveSuccess: The status shows Listening or Receiving and diagnostics show no connection error.
panel.console.readyHint: Account and room are ready. Start listening when you go live.
panel.console.connectingHint: Connecting to the live room. This usually takes only a moment.
panel.console.liveHint: Room events are being received. Interaction settings continue to run automatically.
panel.console.errorHint: The room could not be reached. Review diagnostics and try again.
panel.console.stopMessage: NEKO Live will stop receiving room events until you start listening again.
panel.audience.noSession: Start listening to see data for this stream.
panel.audience.viewerCountCapped: There are many engaged viewers, so the count is shown up to 5000+.
panel.audience.noSessionViewers: No viewer interactions yet in this stream.
